tools.name: list_tunings
tools.description: Catalog of all 43 AgentTune personality tuning files (slug, code, name, one-line blurb), optionally filtered by system. Use it to resolve a user's personality type to the right slug before calling get_tuning.

tools.name: get_tuning
tools.description: Fetch one tuning file as Markdown with YAML front-matter. The front-matter is machine-readable install metadata (install.surfaces = where to write it per agent surface, verify.probe = how to confirm it took effect); the body is the behavioral tuning to load as system-prompt content. MIT licensed.

tools.name: get_test_spec
tools.description: Fetch a complete, self-contained test specification as Markdown: full item list, response scale, scoring algorithm, and the mapping from result to tuning slug. Administer the items to the user inline (bulk-paste is fine), score per the algorithm, then call get_tuning. Tests: mbti (OEJTS, 32 items, ~

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_tunings" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Catalog of all 43 AgentTune personality tuning files (slug, code, name, one-line blurb), optionally filtered by system. Use it to resolve a user's personality t…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
